title: felicia minima
intro: Felicia minima, also known as the lesser felicia or felicia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Felicia minima include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
